trust_boundary.reliance_statement: This adapter describes a simulated trace evidence shape. Trace spans are observations; they are not authoritative decisions.

control_surface.description: Simulated trace spans binding actor, protected action, and observed decision context across a controlled call path.

decision_event.description: Simulated trace span carrying ProofRail decision attributes for a protected action invocation.

bypass_evidence.limitation: Trace systems may show missing or orphan spans, but cannot affirmatively confirm a bypass was attempted at this layer. Bypass evidence should come from a gateway, SIEM, or native ProofRail bypass tester.

revocation_status.limitation: Trace spans typically record observed attributes but not authoritative revocation status; an authority/gateway/policy source should supply revocation evidence.

subject_hashes.limitation: Trace systems carry span identifiers, not subject content hashes; subject hashes should come from the manifest or the gateway.

source_identity.description: Source identity is the trace collector identity declared in adapter metadata; this is not a trust decision.

timestamp_integrity.description: Trace spans carry timestamps; v0.2.6 does not verify collector clock trust.

normalization_notes: Maps trace span attributes to the normalized protected action observation.
Treats span decision attribute as an observation, not an authoritative decision.
Does not assert that span attributes are tamper-evident.

adapter_limitations: Static descriptor only; no real trace collector integration.
Trace spans are observations, not authoritative decisions.
Missing spans are ambiguous and should not be relied on for bypass evidence.
non_claims: This adapter is not a certification.
This adapter does not make the trace collector a trust authority.
This adapter does not assert that any real observability product is conformant.
